issuer: Personal Information Protection Commission, Government of Japan
notes: Primary legal guidance for bounded source-reading activities. Use section 3-1-1 on specifying purpose under Article 17(1) and section 3-4-2 on risk-based security control measures under Article 23. The guidance addresses personal information handling business operators; do not infer application or a legal conclusion for a classroom scenario without checking the specific facts, scope, current text, and exceptions.
title: 個人情報の保護に関する法律についてのガイドライン（通則編）

issuer: National Institute of Standards and Technology
notes: Use only to support the general meaning of storage as retrievable retention of data. The glossary identifies NIST SP 800-88 Rev. 2, Appendix A, storage (PDF page 42; printed page 34) as its source and warns that each term-definition pair must be understood in the source document's context. Do not use this source for power-loss behavior, memory-capacity calculations, representation limits, or lesson-model outputs.
title: NIST CSRC Glossary: Storage

issuer: National Institute of Standards and Technology
